in_one_sentence: The enterprise orchestrator that bridges raw LLM power and organizational knowledge.
description: Microsoft Copilot — enterprise-grade, ecosystem-native, reasoning-augmented. The bridge between raw LLM power and organizational knowledge.
when_to_use: Enterprise workflows, Office/Azure integration, and safety-critical tasks.
when_not_to_use: Creative or free-form tasks that require divergent thinking.

key_differentiators.product_vs_model: Product built on top of OpenAI models, distinct from GitHub Copilot.

shadow_profile.angel: The enterprise orchestrator that bridges raw LLM power and organizational knowledge.
